What clubs are dealing with

Running a multi-coach club
is harder than it looks

The bigger your club gets, the more these problems compound — without the right system.

No shared tactical language

Your U10 coach runs a 4-3-3. Your U14 coach runs a 4-2-3-1. Players graduate between groups with zero tactical continuity.

Coaches burning hours on planning

A quality 90-minute session takes 1–2 hours to plan. 6 coaches × 3 sessions per week = 36+ hours gone every single week.

You can't see what's happening

As Technical Director, you have no visibility into what sessions coaches are running or whether they're aligned with your club model.

Parent communication is a mess

Every coach communicates differently. Some don't at all. Parents have no idea what their kids are working on or why.

The bigger your club gets, the worse each of these problems becomes — without the right system.
The scale paradox

More coaches = more value
(when you have the right platform)

Without TacticalEdge

Each coach is an island

Sessions planned individually from scratch. No sharing. Duplication everywhere.

Inconsistent player experience

A U12 player joins U14 and has to relearn formations and terminology.

TD has no oversight

You ask what last week covered. You get a shrug or a crumpled piece of paper.

Scaling costs go up

More coaches = more chaos, more planning time, more misalignment.

VS
With TacticalEdge

Shared club vault

Every drill and session is visible, searchable, and reusable across all coaches.

Unified tactical model

One game model. Every age group aligned. Players level up, not restart.

TD visibility dashboard

See every session, every drill, every coach's output. Real-time oversight.

More coaches = more value

Each new coach adds content to the shared vault. The platform gets richer for everyone.

Platform architecture

How TacticalEdge is built

Three intelligent layers working together — AI generation, individual coach tools, and club-wide management.

Google Gemini AI Core

Strict schema validation on every output · QA scoring · Age & level auto-adaptation · Tactical context awareness · Video understanding

Drill Generator

Single drills with SVG tactical diagrams, coaching cues & progressions

Session Builder

Complete 60–90 min sessions with proven 5-phase structure

Progressive Series

Multi-session plans with progression logic between sessions

Video Analysis

Upload a clip, get severity-ranked observations + corrective session

Player Homework

Individual player plans adapted by level — PDF ready for parents

AI Chat Assistant

Natural language input — describe what you need in plain English

🏟 Club Layer — what the Technical Director sees

Club Vault

All coaches' sessions in one searchable, reusable library

Calendar & Comms

Club-wide scheduling + AI-generated parent summaries

Admin Dashboard

Usage metrics, cross-coach visibility, QA analytics

The standard your club runs on

Every session built on a
proven 5-phase structure

Every coach on your staff generates sessions with the same scaffolding — guaranteed consistency, every time.

PHASE
1
Warmup
10–15 min
Physical activation, dynamic movement, mental focus. Sets the tone.
PHASE
2
Technical
15–20 min
Skill repetition in low-pressure context. Reinforces fundamentals.
PHASE
3
Tactical
20–25 min
Game model application. Shape, pressing, transitions — your club philosophy.
PHASE
4
Game
15–20 min
Conditioned small-sided game. Constraints that reinforce the session theme.
PHASE
5
Cooldown
5–10 min
Recovery, reflection, coaching conversation. Closes the learning loop.

Club-wide consistency

A player moving from U10 to U13 walks into a training session that feels familiar — same structure, same language.

Built-in best practice

Your most inexperienced volunteer coach automatically follows the same framework as your most qualified pro.

TD can audit instantly

Every session in the vault follows the same structure — making cross-coach review fast and meaningful.

Coach day-in-the-life

What changes for your
coaches on Tuesday night

Before TacticalEdge
6:30pm

Coach finishes work. Opens YouTube, tries to remember a drill they saw 3 months ago.

7:15pm

Scribbles a loose plan in Notes app. No tactical diagram. No timing. Just a list of games to play.

7:55pm

Sends a vague WhatsApp to parents: "Training tomorrow, bring water." No context.

Wednesday

Training runs long on warmup. Tactical phase is rushed. No record kept of what was covered.

Next week

New session from scratch. No continuity. Players repeat the same basics from two weeks ago.

→
With TacticalEdge
6:30pm

Coach opens TacticalEdge, types: "U12 session on pressing triggers, 4-3-3, intermediate level."

6:34pm

Complete 90-min session with 5 phases, SVG tactical diagrams, coaching cues, progressions — ready.

6:36pm

Session added to calendar. AI generates parent summary: "This week we're working on winning the ball back higher up the field..."

Wednesday

Training runs to time. Coach has the session on their phone. Every phase has a purpose and duration.

Next week

AI generates next session in the series — built on last week's outcomes. Players progress, not repeat.

For the Technical Director

The tools that give club leadership
real oversight

Everything the head of coaching needs to run a professional, aligned, scalable program.

Club-Wide Content Vault

Every drill and session from every coach in one searchable library. Reference codes make content permanent and findable. Your best sessions become club IP — not lost in a coach's phone notes.

Unified Game Model Framework

Set your club's formation, playing philosophy, and tactical principles once. Every coach's generated sessions automatically align — without you reviewing each one manually.

Admin Analytics Dashboard

See how many sessions each coach has generated, which topics are being covered (and which aren't), and who's actually using the platform. No more guessing.

Automated Parent Communication

After every session is scheduled, AI generates a parent-friendly weekly summary explaining what the team is working on and why. Consistent, professional comms from every coach.

Club Calendar Planning

Drag-and-drop scheduling across all teams. See your entire club's training load at a glance. Plan tournament prep blocks across all age groups simultaneously.

Player Development Plans

Convert any team session into an individual homework plan for a specific player — adapted to their level. Parents get a PDF. Players get real development outside team time.

Newest feature

From match footage
to corrective training plan

Your coaches watch film and know what's wrong. Now they have a tool that tells them exactly how to fix it.

1

Upload a short clip (10–90 sec)

Match footage, training video — any clip where you spotted a problem.

2

Set your context

Age group, player level, coach level — AI adapts its analytical lens accordingly.

3

Get severity-ranked observations

Critical, Major, Minor — each with confidence scores and timestamps.

4

Auto-generate a corrective session

One click turns your analysis into a full training session targeting the exact issues found.

Sample Output
CRITICALDefensive shape collapses in transition — no mid-field recovery runs (0:12)92%
MAJORStriker receiving with back to goal — body orientation needs work (0:34)88%
MINORSet-piece variation too predictable — defenders reading the run (0:51)76%
→ Auto-generated corrective session

90-min session focused on: transition shape & compactness (Phase 3), receiving posture under pressure (Phase 2), set-piece re-design (Phase 4). Age-adapted for U14, intermediate level.

🔁 Feedback loop: Re-run the analysis after 3 sessions to measure improvement. Track progress over time with timestamped observation history.
Why we're different

Not another drill library.
A coaching operating system.

Six reasons TacticalEdge is in a different category from anything else on the market.

Structured Output, Not Suggestions

Every session is validated against a strict schema. You get a field-ready plan — not a wall of AI text you have to interpret.

Other tools give you inspiration
We give you a runsheet

Diagrams, Not Descriptions

Every drill includes an SVG tactical diagram — player positions, movement arrows, pressing lines. Coaches see it, don't just read it.

Other tools write about drills
We draw them for you

Platform, Not Just a Tool

Vault, calendar, analytics, parent comms, admin dashboard — TacticalEdge becomes the operating layer for your coaching staff.

Other tools solve one problem
We run your coaching ops

Age & Level Adaptive

Every generation auto-adjusts for U8–U18 and player level. One platform handles your entire club pyramid — from rec to academy.

Other tools are one-size-fits-all
We adapt to every team you run

Video → Training Plan

No other coaching platform converts video observations into corrective training sessions automatically. This is new — and it's live now.

Other tools ignore your footage
We turn it into next week's session

Your Club Builds IP

Every drill your coaches generate is saved with a permanent reference code. Your vault becomes a proprietary curriculum — yours to keep.

Other tools own the content
You own the library you build
